title: CPAchecker Configurable Software Verification
summary: Implementing a simplified CPAchecker (Configurable Software Verification) framework in Python. The task covers the CPA worklist algorithm, value analysis, predicate analysis with path feasibility checking, k-induction, and bounded model checking.
instructionPreview: Implement a simplified CPAchecker (Configurable Software Verification) framework in Python. Starting from a skeleton with CFA data structures, CPA interfaces, a C parser, and benchmark programs, progressively build: (1) the CPA worklist algorithm with value analysis, (2) predicate analysis with path feasibility checking, and (3) k-induction and bounded model checking. Each stage must correctly verify 4 benchmark C programs (12 total).
instruction: Implement a simplified CPAchecker (Configurable Software Verification) framework in Python. Starting from a skeleton with CFA data structures, CPA interfaces, a C parser, and benchmark programs, progressively build: (1) the CPA worklist algorithm with value analysis, (2) predicate analysis with path feasibility checking, and (3) k-induction and bounded model checking. Each stage must correctly verify 4 benchmark C programs (12 total).

moduleDag.description: Implementing a simplified CPAchecker (Configurable Software Verification) framework in Python. The task covers the CPA worklist algorithm, value analysis, predicate analysis with path feasibility checking, k-induction, and bounded model checking.

nodes.label: CPA Worklist Algorithm with Value Analysis
nodes.description: CPA algorithm + LocationCPA + ExplicitValueCPA + CompositeCPA. Implements the configurable program analysis framework with worklist-based reachability, abstract state lattice, merge/stop operators, transfer relations, and a composite CPA combining location tracking with explicit integer value analysis.

nodes.label: Predicate Analysis with Path Feasibility Checking
nodes.description: Predicate abstraction with symbolic constraint tracking and path feasibility. Implements predicate CPA with Cartesian/Boolean abstraction, SSA-based path formula construction, ARG for counterexample extraction, CEGAR loop with Craig interpolation for precision refinement, and SMT solver interface.

nodes.label: k-Induction and Bounded Model Checking
nodes.description: k-induction proof rule + BMC with incremental unrolling + witness generation. Implements bounded model checking with loop unrolling, k-induction with base case and inductive step, auxiliary invariant generation via interval and monotonicity analysis, and SV-COMP witness output in GraphML format.

edges.label: Predicate CPA builds on the core CPA framework and algorithm
k-Induction and BMC reuse path formula encoding and SMT infrastructure
